description: Candidate public asset sources for the first Mac Game Rigger production-trial pack. These are source candidates only; do not treat a slot as realAsset until the binary is downloaded, inspected, and registered in samples/manifest.json.

licenseBasis.summary: Quaternius states that models are under CC0, usable without attribution in commercial, educational, and personal projects.
Kenney states that game assets on its asset pages are public domain licensed (CC0) and usable in commercial projects.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Animated Man Pack - Animated Human.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as first real-source evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-001/; Blender import and MGR workflow pass, preview orientation is normalized, but deformation score is 2 and engine import remains blocked.
Pick a short-limb or large-head stylized character if present; otherwise mark this slot as needing a second public source.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack - Knight_Male.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as the first armored/bulky humanoid evidence slot. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-003/; Blender import, MGR workflow, Unity-profile export, and Unity batchmode import pass. Deformation score is 3 usable-with-cleanup.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack - Wizard.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as H-004 real humanoid evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-004/; Blender import, MGR workflow, Unity-profile export, and Unity batchmode import pass. Deformation score is 3 usable-with-cleanup.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack - Pirate_Male.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as H-005 real humanoid evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-005/; Blender import and MGR workflow pass, deformation score is 3 usable-with-cleanup, and engine import is not yet verified.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Animated Woman Pack - Animated Woman.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as complete low-quality evidence. Blender import and MGR workflow pass, preview framing/orientation is readable and stress pose evidence is stronger, but deformation output is still not production-ready; manifest score is 2 with failureType deformation quality issue.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack - Soldier_Male.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as H-009 real wide-shoulder humanoid evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-009/; Blender import and MGR workflow pass, deformation score is 3 usable-with-cleanup, and engine import is not yet verified.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Character Pack - Elf.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as thin-limb humanoid evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/H-010/; Blender import and MGR workflow pass, deformation score is 3 usable-with-cleanup, and engine import is not yet verified.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Animal Pack - Husky.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as Q-001 real quadruped evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/Q-001/; Blender import, MGR quadruped workflow, quadruped gait/side pose operators, x-axis primary preview, Unity-profile export, and Unity batchmode import pass. It is not production-clean because direct shaded Blender review remains open.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Animal Pack - Fox.fbx
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Selected and registered as Q-002 real quadruped evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/Q-002/; Blender import, MGR quadruped workflow, quadruped gait/side pose operators, and x-axis primary preview support score 3 usable-with-cleanup. It satisfies the second quadruped gate but still needs engine import and direct shaded Blender review before production use.

Selected and registered as C-001 real tail-creature evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/C-001/; Blender import, dedicated tail-creature workflow, QA, preview generation, Unity-profile FBX export, and Unity batchmode import pass. Deformation score is now 3 because the tail-creature template keeps the long neck/tail silhouette readable, but direct shaded review and cleanup are still required before production use.

Selected and registered as P-001 internal prop evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/P-001/; Blender import, generic prop classification, dedicated prop_hinge workflow, CLI-level hinge pivot/base controls, Blender UI sliders, artist-controlled hinge open angle, rotation axis, and positive/negative swing direction, selected-mesh prop landmark generation, draggable Empty-based hinge visual guides that can be committed back to landmarks, prop_hinge-only Blender GizmoGroup registration with pivot and swing-tip X/Y/Z arrow handles bound to guide locations, headless Blender smoke coverage for guide creation, guide move, commit, armature generation, and hinge-open pose, prop-specific weight diagnostics, prop coverage threshold QA, hinge-open preview, Unity-profile FBX export, and Unity batchmode import pass. This validates prop workflow behavior, but it is not a public-source CC0 candidate and still needs polished interactive viewport gizmo UX before production use.

Selected and registered as P-002 internal chunky prop evidence. Local binary is kept under ignored local_assets/P-002/; Blender import, broader chunky prop classification, dedicated prop_hinge workflow, CLI-level hinge pivot/base/axis controls, Blender UI hinge open angle, rotation axis, and positive/negative swing direction controls, prop_hinge-only Blender GizmoGroup registration with pivot and swing-tip X/Y/Z arrow handles bound to guide locations, headless Blender smoke coverage for guide creation, guide move, commit, armature generation, and hinge-open pose, prop-specific weight diagnostics, prop coverage threshold QA, hinge-open preview, Unity-profile FBX export, and Unity batchmode import pass. This validates real chunky prop workflow behavior beyond thin door-like slabs, but it is not a public-source CC0 candidate and still needs polished interactive hinge orientation UX before production use.

registrationRule: A candidate becomes a realAsset only after the binary is downloaded, license/source is recorded, and local asset path or storage reference is known.
nextAction: Production-trial evidence gate passes with humanoid, quadruped, tail-creature, and two internal prop evidence slots. Prop hinge axis is exposed as a Blender UI enum/dropdown, draggable Empty-based hinge guides can be committed back to rig landmarks, artists can tune prop hinge open angle, rotation axis, and positive/negative swing direction for pose review, the prop_hinge-only Blender GizmoGroup now creates pivot and swing-tip X/Y/Z arrow handles bound to guide locations, and scripts/verify_prop_hinge_gizmo_workflow.py provides repeatable headless Blender smoke coverage for guide creation, guide move, commit, armature generation, and hinge-open pose. Next focus: polish real interactive viewport gizmo UX, validate prop QA against another real mechanical shape, and collect direct shaded Blender review plus scale/orientation notes for score-3 assets.
